rows.label: tev000895_MSG0001
rows.name: Hey, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0002
rows.name:
So did you live in a house like
this when you were back on Earth?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_SEL0011
rows.name: Say you have a vague memory of that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_SEL0021
rows.name: Say you probably lived in an apartment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_JNK0030
rows.name: Shrug[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_SEL0031
rows.name: Say you have no idea.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0010
rows.name:
Huh, so you do have at least SOME
hazy memories about stuff like that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0011
rows.name:
I bet you lived in a big house, played with
your dog in the yard, and held house parties
on weekends. You probably tore it UP![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0012
rows.name:
I don't really remember doing anything like
that. When I try to think back to how I used
to live, I get a big old pile of crap.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0013
rows.name:
I don't remember playin' basketball
in the yard, or riding around in a
car my parents bought for me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0014
rows.name:
I thought you and me were in the
same boat, but now I'm startin'
to think we probably ain't.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0016
rows.name: Yeah, that's a possibility.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0017
rows.name:
I don't remember much, but I know I
never lived in a house like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0018
rows.name:
I don't remember playin' basketball
in the yard, or riding around in a
car my parents bought for me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0019
rows.name:
But if you lived in an
apartment, maybe I did too?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0020
rows.name:
Yeah, that sounds kinda familiar. Heh. I think I used
to get in fights with the rocker next door for playin'
his crappy guitar at all goddamn hours of the night![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0022
rows.name: Ah, you don't remember neither, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0023
rows.name:
There must be some sort of glitch in the
way the Lifepoint preserves memories.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0024
rows.name:
If everyone loses their memories like us,
then Project Exodus won't mean squat! They
better get the damn thing fixed...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0026
rows.name:
Well, I'm headin' back to the
administrative district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0027
rows.name:
I gotta go talk to Eleonora. I've
been asked if I'd be interested in
a transfer to the Avalanche Union.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0028
rows.name:
And yeah, I'm open to it. This
seems like a good time to get
out of the debris-hunting game.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0029
rows.name:
But I've also made some close friends in the
Testament. So I'm gonna talk it over with
Eleonora and then give it a good think.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0030
rows.name:
But wherever I end up, I'm still
me. So if there's ever anything
you need, I'm your man.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000895_MSG0031
rows.name: Let's keep on kickin' this planet's ass![ST:wait ]
